title: Low-input DNA extractions in 96-well plates
author: Tom Harrop
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.birqkd5w

steps.title: Dissect e
steps.instruction: Dissect e.g. 1 M. hyperodae pupa for a single sample. Place up to 88 individuals in a 1000 µL, round well deepwell plate Add 2 3.2 mm stainless steel ball bearings and 100 µL of lysis buffer with RNase to each well.

steps.title: Homogenise the tissue for 90 seconds...
steps.instruction: Homogenise the tissue for 90 seconds at 1200 RPM using a plate-compatible tissue homogenizer, e.g. SPEX SamplePrep 2010 Geno/Grinder. 00:01:30

steps.title: Prepare 100 µL lysis buffer per sample
steps.instruction: Prepare 100 µL lysis buffer per sample. %s %s The Zymo lysis solution can be bought separately. This protocol also works with the Zymo Solid Tissue Buffer II that is supplied with the Quick-DNA Magbead Plus kit. Solid Tissue Buffer II comes as a 2x concentrate and has to be diluted with nuclease-free water.

steps.title: Seal the plate and mix on the plate shaker
steps.instruction: Seal the plate and mix on the plate shaker. Make sure the paste is resuspended. Incubate at 37°C for 30 minutes. 00:30:00 37 °C

steps.title: Add 5 µL Proteinase K solution...
steps.instruction: Add 5 µL Proteinase K solution (20 mg/mL) and mix on the plate shaker. Incubate at 55°C for 120 minutes, shaking the plate for one minute every 30 minutes. 02:00:00 55 °C

steps.title: Spin the plate for 10 minutes at 1,000 RPM
steps.instruction: Spin the plate for 10 minutes at 1,000 RPM. 1000 rpm, 15 °C, 10 minutes

steps.title: Transfer 100 µL of lysate to a 0
steps.instruction: Transfer 100 µL of lysate to a 0.8 mL deepwell plate.

steps.title: Set up the reagents from the...
steps.instruction: Set up the reagents from the ZYMO Quick -DNA Magbead Plus Kit

steps.title: Add the following reagents to the 7-position ReservoirRack %s %s
steps.instruction: Add the following reagents to the 7-position ReservoirRack %s %s

steps.title: Run the epMotion protocol 88x Quick-DNA...
steps.instruction: Run the epMotion protocol 88x Quick-DNA Magbead Plus Low Volume 40_6.

steps.title: Run the protocol with level sensing enabled
steps.instruction: Run the protocol with level sensing enabled.
